misc: His usual shot shape could be described as a "power draw".
biography: Jussi, representing St. Laurence Golf, has been a familiar presence within the Hector Trophée, having participated in four past editions of this esteemed pair competition. While he will not be among the field for the forthcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his past appearances have been characterized by a powerful and distinctive shot shape: his signature power draw, a testament to his attacking approach.

Throughout his four engagements, Jussi has diligently navigated both the individual and team challenges. Despite his earnest efforts and consistent application of his robust game, he has not yet hoisted either the coveted Hector Trophée alongside a partner or claimed the prestigious Victor Trophy as an individual champion. His commitment to his impactful style, however, has consistently been a highlight of his play.

Although absent from the 2026 iteration, Jussi remains an active and valued member within the wider Hector events community. His strategic power game and persistent quest for a breakthrough victory ensure that his journey continues to be followed with considerable interest, and his eventual return to the championship fairways would be eagerly anticipated.
